page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeeplyEssential is a Deep neural network for the identification of Essential genes in bacteria species. The dataset used for the learning of the nework contains 30 bacterial species collected from DEG.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeeplyEssential is a Deep neural network for the identification of Essential genes in bacteria species. The dataset used for the learning of the nework contains 30 bacterial species collected from DEG.
